reviews.text:
My husband and I were blessed with an incredible group of vendors for our wedding, and Sarah and her team were truly at the top of the list! We wanted a photographer local to the area who knew our venue well and could guide us to the best locations for photos—and Sarah was exactly that and more.

From the moment we met her for our engagement session, we clicked instantly. Even my husband (who is not big on photos, haha!) said the experience went far better than he expected and that he was genuinely happy we had hired her. Leading up to the wedding, we had a few virtual meetings to make sure everything was organized. Sarah and John exceeded every expectation. She came prepared for absolutely everything—down to packing umbrellas in case of rain—and she even bustled my dress faster than anyone at the reception!

Sarah is not only an exceptional photographer but also a truly wonderful human being. My family and wedding party had nothing but amazing things to say about working with her. We could not recommend her enough. Easiest 5+ stars of our lives!

We hope to see her this winter on the slopes—and we won’t hesitate to reach out again whenever we need more photos. SIMPLY THE BEST!!!

We cannot thank Sarah and her team enough for our incredible wedding photos. My husband did the important job of finding Sarah to photograph our engagement in Wash Park, and after working together, we couldn't imagine our wedding day without her!

Sarah is wonderful and was easy to work with. She is a fantastic communicator, was proactive in her planning, and was an absolute joy to spend our wedding day with. She went above and beyond on the big day, taking care of all the things you would expect a wedding photographer to manage and so much more.

If you're looking for a talented photographer to capture your special day that you'll genuinely enjoy sharing your day with, look no further!

We would first like to start off by saying Sarah is absolutely lovely to work with and she is by far the most talented wedding photographer I’ve ever seen. Our wedding was in June in Vail, CO. She captured the mountains, the village, the chapel and the special moments I asked for from the beginning. Our engagement photos almost a year ago turned out amazing as well. The day of the wedding, I honestly felt like Sarah was our wedding planner, because she was with us the entire time and made sure we were always on time with the time line. That was very important to me. She took charge and worked well with our videographer’s. She made sure everyone was where they were supposed to be and especially extended family members. She stayed with us till the reception was almost over and I can say, that she didn’t miss anything from the beginning of the day till the end. The most important part of all, was that her pictures were outstanding and the color and clarity were beyond words. I have got so many compliments on our photos. We think she is the best and that is why we will recommend her to anyone. You know the saying, “you get what you pay for”?. Well it shows, because we have seen other couples wedding photos and they don’t compare at all. We are so happy because ALL her photos were stunning and gorgeous! One of my biggest fears from the beginning, was how our pictures would turn out, because I had to fire our first photographer because her photos were not that good. We found out that Sarah’s services were a little more expensive, but she was worth it, because we got great photos and gained a friend. Sarah is lovely and great to work with. She really has a passion for what she does. I would like to end with this, your wedding day is one of the most special moments in your life, do you want to make sure you have the most beautiful wedding photos to look back on? The only person I would recommend is Sarah Roshan. She is a first class photographer all the way!

My husband and I recently had the pleasure of working with Sarah Roshan and her photographer, Lisa, for our destination wedding in Colorado, and we couldn't be more thrilled with the results. From start to finish, Sarah demonstrated a level of professionalism, creativity, kindness, passion that truly exceeded our expectations even with unexpected storms, needed timeline adjustments, a moose sighting, my injury during our first kiss, and our best man dressing as a bride during the reception.

Sarah made entire process seamless and enjoyable while also helping keep our day moving forward as seamlessly as possible. Before the big day, they took the time to understand our vision and preferences by phone and email and they knew the unique aspects of Breckenridge. This attention to detail allowed them to capture the essence of our love story against the breathtaking backdrop of Breckenridge, CO. Their experience with weddings was evident, as they navigated the challenges of storms and rain in the evening varying lighting conditions while incorporated the natural beauty of the surroundings into every shot.

During the ceremony and reception, Sarah and Lisa were discreet yet managed to capture the most intimate and spontaneous moments. Their ability to blend into the background while still being present for the key moments was truly impressive. They skillfully directed us and our guests when needed, ensuring that everyone looked their best while maintaining a natural, relaxed, and fun atmosphere.

The final photographs are nothing short of spectacular. Sarah and Lisa have an incredible talent for storytelling through images. Each photo tells a part of our wedding story, from the candid laughter during the speeches to the quiet moments shared between my husband and I. Our preview photos were delivered within about a week and the final gallery was delivered within about 7 weeks, and they were separated between each section of our wedding day. The online platform they used made it easy for us to share the photos with family and friends, who were equally impressed with the quality of the work.

In addition to their technical skill, Sarah and Lisa were a joy to work with. They were friendly, accommodating, and genuinely invested in making our wedding day memorable. Their passion for their craft was evident, and it added an extra layer of joy to the entire experience.

In conclusion, Sarah and her photographer, Lisa, are more than photographers; they are a true artists and storytellers. If you're considering a destination or local wedding and want someone who can capture the magic of the moment while capturing natures beauty, look no further. We wholeheartedly recommend Sarah Roshan Photography and their exceptional talent, professionalism, and ability to turn moments into timeless memories. Our wedding album is a testament to their artistry, and we will cherish it for a lifetime.

I had the pleasure of working with Sarah Roshan at a wedding in Naples on 10/25/25, and she was absolutely incredible to work alongside. As a DJ, I’ve worked with a lot of photographers and videographers, but Sarah really stands out — professional, easy to communicate with, and genuinely passionate about capturing every moment perfectly. Her energy kept the day flowing smoothly, and you can tell she truly cares about her couples. I’d highly recommend her to anyone looking for a photographer or videographer who goes above and beyond!
